value.rationale: The Implementation Plan feature is generated by Antigravity's agent (Google) as an artifact that users can review, comment on, and configure approval policies for. This is primarily a remote/async agent control feature — it allows users to inspect and direct what the coding agent will do before execution proceeds. The artifact review policy (approval policies) also touches guardrails-safety. The closest existing parent is google-antigravity-2-0, and it maps most closely to the remote-agent-control capability (monitoring and directing an agent asynchronously), with a secondary mapping to guardrails-safety (the configurable approval policy). It is a partial fit for remote-agent-control since it covers only the planning/approval slice of that capability.
